The work, all projects delivered asynchronously through the Platform.

  • GutFix - Branding & Rules

    21h

    Complete GutFix branding revamp: light-mode visual system, new logo lockup, color palette, typefaces, and custom UI snippets with marketing collateral.

  • Relay - Branding & UI

    49h

    Complete branding package delivered with personalized marketing collateral.

    Additionally, select UI snippets were delivered.

  • Ascend - Branding & Logo

    71h

    The Ascend project involved the creation of a comprehensive logo and identity system. The design focused on a modern and minimalist aesthetic.

  • Callura - Branding

    28h

    A complete brand identity was delivered for Callura, emphasizing a fluid, gradient aesthetic. This included marketing collateral and digital/wearable product UI mockups.

  • Reson - Branding & Identity

    8h

    A full brand identity was delivered for Reson, an AI audio platform. This included a soft four-petal logomark, grain-textured gradient palette, and custom typography system.

  • Meridian - Branding & Misc

    4h

    The Meridian project involved a complete brand identity for a feature-flagging platform. This included a geometric logomark, mono typeface, and full brand guidelines.

Everything Knot produces lives in your design drive.

Organized, version-controlled, shareable, all on the cloud. Your brand's entire visual history is always one click away.

AI analysis on files

Google Drive compatibility

Global share links

Agentic AI to tie it all together.

Submit requests, check status, get briefing help, surface old files, and do it all through a conversational interface that understands your entire account.

Full agentic capabilities

Comprehensive brand knowledge

A system that never forgets.

Most design services start from zero every month. Knot builds a Style Profile from every deliverable. By your third month subscribed, Knot knows your brand the way an in-house hire would.

Most design services start from zero every month. Knot builds a Style Profile from every deliverable. By your third month subscribed, Knot knows your brand the way an in-house hire would.

Style Profile

Supercharged

Alex

Stripe's identity is an optimistic and developer-first system that treats code and color as equally powerful building blocks


COLOR STORY


The palette grounds a dependable corporate navy with an energetic, almost acidic set of accents,

communicating technical stability with creative potential. This duality rejects the single-note blues of

legacy fintech for a more expressive, future-facing spectrum.


TYPE VOICE


The geometric sans-serif projects an exacting, systematic personality that prioritizes legibility and

structure for a technical audience.


DESIGN PRINCIPLES


  • Structural Color — Gradients are used as a core component to define form and create dimensional, interactive surfaces.

  • Systematic Clarity — A rigid grid and typographic hierarchy create an ordered, predictable experience for developers.

  • Approachable Fidelity — Subtle shadows and softened corners lend a tactile, human quality to digital interfaces.


CATEGORY SIGNAL


Stripe signals its position as a design-led infrastructure layer, not just another transactional payment processor.

See More

stripe.com

Your brand, remembered.

The style profile analysis runs on every completed deliverable, and it automatically updates every 24 hours. The data from your style profile is injected into every new request.
